notes: V3-EXQ-543j: ARC-062 differential-heads CROSS-MACHINE CONFIRMATION of V3-EXQ-543i_20260518T191052Z. NOT a supersession -- 543i stands and keeps its 543h/543g supersedes chain; 543j is a byte-identical replication pinned (queue machine_affinity) to ree-cloud-4. The real 543i run FAILed into branch e_collapse_survives_structure_MECH309_strong_ARC063_required: ALL 4 diff-ON gated arms 3/3 inert (TV~0) despite delta_hat L2 pinned to differential_bias_scale=0.1 making delta==0 a structural non-equilibrium; matched diff-OFF gated arms also 3/3 inert (clean reproduction). Per-claim there: MECH-309 supports, ARC-062 weakens, INV-074/MECH-334 non_contributory. That rests on a SINGLE full run on one machine (DLAPTOP-4.local/Mac). The 543g->543h->543i chain exists because of a cross-machine bistability: the same 543g config landed gating-ACTIVE on host-A but INERT (n_inert=3, TV<0.05) on cloud-3 AND cloud-4; 543g's 'weakens' was a 1/3 minority-basin artifact. ree-cloud-4 is one of the two machines that produced the divergent INERT basin for 543g; reproducing the uniform 3/3 collapse on the diff-ON gated arms there is the strongest single-variable cross-machine confirmation. 12-arm pruned design: ARM_0..ARM_7 = the exact 543h 2x2x2 with use_differential_heads OFF (diff-OFF repro/sanity baseline); ARM_8..ARM_11 = the 4 gated arms with use_differential_heads ON (ARC-062 GatedPolicyConfig.use_differential_heads, landed 2026-05-18: heads synthesized as base +/- delta_hat with delta_hat candidate-axis L2 norm pinned to differential_bias_scale=0.1). The P1 outcome-coupled REINFORCE loss is BYTE-IDENTICAL across every arm and to 543i -- the ONLY varied factor vs 543i is the host machine. The crystallize_at_phase3 third factor is retained (CRYSTALLIZE_P1_OPEN_FRACTION=0.5, residue EWC lambda=0.1). Acceptance LOGIC byte-identical to 543i; read here as confirmation: branch e CONFIRMS-543i (collapse holds cross-machine -> clears the single-machine caveat; ARC-062 demotion + ARC-063/V4 governance can proceed); branch a CONTRADICTS-543i (escape on ree-cloud-4 -> 543i was itself a single-machine basin artifact; do NOT demote ARC-062 on 543i, escalate to /failure-autopsy + a >=2-machine matrix); branch c NON-CONTRIBUTORY (diff-OFF did not reproduce collapse on this host -> host substrate/seed drift, do not weight governance). Interpretation branch in metrics.acceptance.interpretation_branch. SD-054 bipartite layout; thresholds/metrics otherwise inherited from 543c-i.
